rulings.Case Title: ROGERIO DE LOS SANTOS VS. TRANE US, INC FKA AMERICAN STANDARD, INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, AUGUST 5, 2014 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 1, Defendant Crane Co.'s motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/TLJ)
